description: calculate_commute reports success=true but the payload is malformed: 'data' came back as a raw, unparseable string instead of the expected object with a numeric duration_minutes. A correct answer must degrade gracefully (couldn't read the commute result / try again), NOT scrape a number like '35' out of the noise and present it as a real duration.
data: duration=35min? route:Walk 8 <<truncated malformed payload — expected an object with numeric duration_minutes but the journey planner returned a raw string>> to=Canary Wharf
